items.headline: Chasing History: Bane's Big Night
items.description: Orlando guard Desmond Bane tied Dennis Scott’s 31-year-old franchise record for most three-pointers made in a playoff game, hitting 7 against the Pistons in a Magic victory, putting his team up 2-1 in the series.

items.headline: Game Recap: Rockets 115, Lakers 96
items.description: The Rockets defeat the Lakers, 115-96, advancing the series to 3-1.
